positive: A detailed, symmetrical graphic design poster featuring a stylized celestial scene: a magnificent crescent moon intertwined with glowing, abstract constellations and geometric bioluminescent flora. The style must be Neo-Art Deco combined with modern graphic novel linework. Composition is central and highly balanced, designed to look excellent printed on fabric. Use clean silhouettes and strong, luminous contrast. Color direction should utilize a deep midnight blue or indigo background, accented only with radiant glowing gold foil lines and complementary teal/lavender neon accents. Focus on flat, printable layers and high graphical fidelity, suitable for screen printing or vinyl decals.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, cropped, jpeg artifacts, noise, grain, bad anatomy, deformed, out of focus, extra limbs, messy, clutter
